raw_consumer_statement:
This is in regards to the purchase of {$45.00} at " XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. I had opened the dispute on XX/XX/XXXX. Investigation was complete and ruled as " Customer Responsible '' on XX/XX/XXXX. 

XXXX is the transit card agency for the XXXX  XXXX XXXX, servicing regions such as XXXX XXXX and suburbs surrounding it. There has been a recent restructuring that has led to a system upgrade for the card. Issues such as unauthorized charges on cards that have had details entered into the website before have been happening. I have been following up with the company in person and have been led to also contact Citi and other credit cards that I have issued in regards to this problem. 

Citi has previously allowed the disputes on XX/XX/XXXX of two {$20.00} transactions to be credited. Though, this transaction of a larger sum they look longer to look into. I have told them that I did not authorize this charge and also followed up with them after they marked it as " Resolved '' in the Merchant 's favor. They claimed to have reopened the investigation last time, though I see no sign of it. 

I did not authorize this charge, nor did I receive the services that would and should have been provided.
